title: Anbar
description:
Anbar is a fast-paced, competitive multiplayer game where two teams clash inside a single arena with completely opposing goals.

One team builds.
The other disrupts.

Matches are driven by speed, reaction time, and tight teamwork. Control can shift in seconds due to a perfectly timed play, a successful deflection, or a single mistake. Victory is never guaranteed until the very end.

Inspired by a traditional game from Saudi Arabia, Anbar reimagines its core idea into a modern digital experience while preserving its competitive spirit and cultural roots.
description_short: Anbar is a fast-paced multiplayer arena game where two teams clash with opposing goals. Explorers race to build an artifact while Mercenaries use a growing ball combo to disrupt them. Victory depends on speed, timing, and teamwork.
